title: credential_status
description: Legal status of a credential (e.g. an MWBE certification). This is a SEPARATE axis from a DatedObligation.state — obligation timing and credential legal status are never mixed. RECERT_PRESUMPTION_PENDING models the EXC §314(5)(b)-(c) rebuttable recertification presumption; it is deliberately not an obligation state and must never be rendered as OK. A cert_expiry obligation may be LAPSED/OVERDUE while credential_status is RECERT_PRESUMPTION_PENDING. See BACKLOG: §314(5)(b)-(c) golden refresh is a prerequisite before any presumption logic ships.
